title: Fleet playbook claim ledger
description: Every substantive claim in the playbook must have a ledger entry proving it is cited to a source commit. An entry with an empty or placeholder sha is invalid.

path.description: file path within the repo the claim was read from

sha.description: the commit the claim was read at — no placeholders

curated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp this claim was last verified

claim.description: optional human-readable summary of what the entry backs
